历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 38, 37, 50, 28, and 28 respectively. In the last two years, it has stabilized at 28, maintaining this level for two consecutive years from 2024 to 2025, indicating a stable competitive landscape among top science students in Qinghai Province. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province from 2021 to 2026 is consistently 1 person, with no expansion or reduction signals. The enrollment quota is extremely scarce, maintaining high competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 5th in the main ranking of the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but it mainly involves non-medical incidents such as teacher ethics, which has limited impact on medical major applications. Douyin popularity ranks 4th overall (high heat), with continuously high application attention. Fudan University's clinical medicine is an A-level discipline, public health and preventive medicine is A+, nursing is A-, pharmacy is A, and basic medicine is A-. The medical discipline strength is top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates in Qinghai who aspire to study medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation of clinical medicine was "recommended" (slightly hot), and in 2025, it continues to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province is about 48,000, slightly increasing from 2025, with about 30,720 physics category examinees, leading to a slight increase in the competitive base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical rankings stabilizing at 28 in the last two years, the enrollment plan remaining at 1 person unchanged, the top-tier university level with high application heat, and the continuous recommendation of clinical medicine popularity, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 28. The predicted minimum ranking is about 25, with a range of 14 to 36.

Candidates with rankings within 20 are recommended to focus on applying. Those with rankings in the 25–36 range can try applying, but the risk is higher.
